seo.title: Single Candlestick Patterns: What to Look Out For?
seo.description: Single candlestick patterns can offer powerful insights into market sentiment when interpreted correctly. This article breaks down the key elements, like body size, wicks, and trend position, and explains how traders use patterns such as Hammer, Shooting Star, and Doji to anticipate potential market moves.
